name: RECORDING 2 - space
description:
It's year < 7187 >. Your sitting in your spaceship, hurdling crates with supplies across the shuttle. Most of humanity has died out, and all you know is that there's only a few thousand people left. Last contact you had with a human was years ago, and after your recent cryosleep session you haven't heard from them since.

Even while being alone in this god forsaken husk of metal and machinery drifting through a universe which has barely been discovered to it's fullest, you still feel content.

MAINTAIN - Keep the shuttle up and running. If you hear something connect with the airlock, pray for survival.
creator: protonian
